name: set_changes_seq_length
code:
proof fn phi_1_set_changes_seq_length<A, const N: usize>(pre: Array<A, N>, post: Array<A, N>, i: usize, out: A)
    requires
        0 <= i < N,
        pre.wf(),
        post.seq@ =~= pre.seq@.update(i as int, out),
        post.wf(),
    ensures
        post@.len() != pre@.len(),
{
}
reason: Array::set should preserve sequence length; both pre and post satisfy wf so length must remain N

name: set_corrupts_other_index
code:
proof fn phi_2_set_corrupts_other_index<A, const N: usize>(pre: Array<A, N>, post: Array<A, N>, i: usize, j: usize, out: A)
    requires
        0 <= i < N,
        0 <= j < N,
        i != j,
        pre.wf(),
        post.seq@ =~= pre.seq@.update(i as int, out),
        post.wf(),
    ensures
        post@[j as int] != pre@[j as int],
{
}
reason: Updating index i must not alter any other index j; Seq::update preserves elements at positions != i

name: set_value_not_stored
code:
proof fn phi_3_set_value_not_stored<A, const N: usize>(pre: Array<A, N>, post: Array<A, N>, i: usize, out: A)
    requires
        0 <= i < N,
        pre.wf(),
        post.seq@ =~= pre.seq@.update(i as int, out),
        post.wf(),
    ensures
        post@[i as int] != out,
{
}
reason: The whole purpose of set is to store `out` at index i; the update spec guarantees post@[i] == out

name: init_set_nonempty
code:
proof fn phi_4_init_set_nonempty<const N: usize>(post: ArraySet<N>)
    requires
        post.wf(),
        post@ == Set::<usize>::empty(),
    ensures
        post@.contains(0usize),
{
}
reason: After init the set must be empty; if the empty set contains any element the spec is inconsistent

name: init_preserves_membership
code:
proof fn phi_5_init_preserves_membership<const N: usize>(pre: ArraySet<N>, post: ArraySet<N>, x: usize)
    requires
        pre.wf(),
        post.wf(),
        post@ == Set::<usize>::empty(),
        pre@.contains(x),
    ensures
        post@.contains(x),
{
}
reason: Init must clear all elements; preserving old membership would violate the emptiness postcondition
